xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: 11th Floor, Marathon FutureX, N.M. Joshi Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai 400 013
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: 11th Floor, Marathon FutureX, N.M. Joshi Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai 400 013
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfContactPerson: Mr. Madhavan Menon Executive Chairman and Mr. Mahesh Iyer Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: Thomas Cook (India) Limited serves a diverse range of customers seeking travel and tourism services. We cater to individual travellers, families, corporate clients, leisure travellers, honeymooners, adventure seekers, senior citizens, students, special interest groups, and non-resident Indians (NRIs). With a commitment to providing comprehensive travel solutions, the company ensures that each customer's unique needs are met. Our customers are from various parts of the country and of different nationalities ranging from individuals to corporates and Government/ Quasi Government bodies/ authorities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Asian Trails International Travel Services (Beijing) Ltd
Thomas Cook in Destination Mgmt Services
D E I General Trading LLC
BDC Digiphoto Imaging Solutions Private Limited
Travel Corporation (India) Limited (formerly known as SOTC Travel Management Private Limited)
Travel Circle International Ltd (Formerly Known Kuoni Travel (China) Limited)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Increased business will lead to the need for more offices, resulting in a rise in emissions from the increase in electricity usage.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Implementation of energy-efficient technologies and renewable power will help in reducing emissions and help the company achieve its targets.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: The company has the potential to support the development of eco-friendly and sustainable communities in tourist destinations, which can contribute to the growth of these communities. Additionally, being a contributor to the community can improve the company's image and reputation.

Effective corporate governance ensures that the company's management is accountable to its shareholders and acts in their best interests. It also helps to establish clear lines of communication and decision-making, which can improve operational efficiency and ultimately drive profitability.

A diverse board of directors is crucial for any organization seeking to enhance decisionmaking, comprehend and cater to its customer base, and strengthen its reputation. By uniting individuals with distinct backgrounds and perspectives, a diverse board of directors can aid a company in prospering in a rapidly evolving and diverse global landscape.
It gives the corporation the opportunity to contribute to the advancement of society as a whole, as well as access to a bigger pool of talent for its personnel.
Frequent changes in regulations can make it challenging for businesses to maintain ethical and fair employment practices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: All business operations are under strict monitoring to prevent any human rights violations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: As a crucial part of the business growth plan, failing to meet the workforce expectations can negatively impact the company's employee retention rate and business continuity.
Violations of state laws, company rules, and guidelines can have severe financial, legal, and reputational consequences, resulting in the loss of the company's goodwill.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: To ensure that all business operations align with the company's values and norms, robust monitoring and compliance mechanisms are in place.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Effective risk management of various components of the company can aid in decisionmaking and ensure the sustainability and profitability of the business.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The company evaluates risk management procedures in each function to identify potential future concerns and takes necessary measures to mitigate such risks.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Regular assessment of the significance of technology and cyber security is necessary to prevent data privacy breaches involving sensitive information of the business and its stakeholders.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The company has strengthened its security systems, IT and monitoring systems, antivirus, and patch management to mitigate the risks associated with cyber security and data breaches.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Transparency is crucial as customers depend on the information provided by the service company to comprehend what they will receive and make informed decisions. Failing to do so can mislead them, leading to damage to the company's reputation and ultimately impacting its bottom line

Effective advertising and communication strategies can help the company differentiate themselves from competitors and reach their target audience. This is also very effective in helping build brand awareness and increased recognition and trust from customers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: Refer to page no. _______ of the Integrated Annual Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: The Executive Chairman and Managing Director & CEO of the Company are responsible for the implementation and oversight of the BR policies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesManagementAndProcessDiscl: • Code of Conduct -https://resources.thomascook.in/downloads/Code_ of_Conduct_for_the_Board_of_Directors_and_Senior_Management.pdf • Whistle Blower - https://resources.thomascook.in/downloads/ Whistle_Blower_Policy_01_04_2019_final.pdf • CSR - https://resources.thomascook.in/downloads/01_Thomas_ Cook_CSR_Policy.pdf • Equal opportunity, Ethics and Anti-corruption - https://resources. thomascook.in/downlo
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: " Principle 1 : Related Party Transactions, SEBI LODR Amendment Regulations on Material Developments"
" Principle 1 : Related Party Transactions, SEBI LODR Amendment Regulations on Material Developments"
Behavioral & Skill Based, Business Training, Policy & Process, POSH IC, POSH Individual ,FRM, IT - InfoSec / GDPR / Phishing
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Yes, the Company has adopted an Anti-bribery and Anti-corruption Policy. The policy can be viewed at: https://resources.thomascook.in/downloads/File_1_Excerpts_on_Anti_Bribery_Anti_Corruption_Policy.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple1ExplanatoryText: We follow standard and a transparent process for vendor empanelment. Assurance of service quality and delivery. Dual validation and checking for invoice processing. We encourage diverse and equal opportunity work environment. Minimum wages are paid as per governance of the minimum wage act.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: We follow standard and a transparent process for vendor empanelment. Assurance of service quality and delivery. Dual validation and checking for invoice processing. We encourage diverse and equal opportunity work environment. Minimum wages are paid as per governance of the minimum wage act.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: Purchase of highly efficient Inverter Air conditioners replacing older models.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: We have Grievance Management Policy, steps are as mentioned below 1. An employee raises her/his grievance to the RM or to HRBP 2. RM to raise this with the concerned HRBP 3. Incase, if the grievance is against the RM, employee to raise it to HRBP 4. HR to have separate discussions with the employee on the concerned raised 5. Prepare a grievance report ( Mention the findings and conversations had in elaborated manner) 6. Close the grievance as per necessary actions suggested by the Internal Committee
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd:
The organization emphasizes the importance of maintaining a safe and healthy workplace for all employees, workers and third-party stakeholders who work on its premises.
We have annual maintenance contract for all critical and noncritical equipment’s wherein regular planned maintenance activities are conducted for enhancement of life and to avoid any breakdowns/hazards of equipment’s.
Fire Drills Access Control System Fire Detection System & Fire Fighting System. We conduct fire and safety evacuation trainings at large size offices where more than 50 employees and safe assembly area is available.
We conduct class room fire and safety trainings where there are less than 50 employees, nearby all branches are clubbed together & respective branches Spocs attend this training so they can disseminate awareness among all employees.
We share Fire and Safety PPT at all TCIL and SOTC office locations on quarterly basis, this PPT provides a brief overview of fire and safety protocols applicable to all TCIL and SOTC offices across our PAN India locations. This PPT is designed to enhance our employees' awareness of fire safety practices, especially in areas where training cannot be conducted in person.
We conduct Fire and Safety audit at all office locations to ensure that all critical risk and observations are highlighted and resolved to make work place safe.
CCTV Monitoring We conduct structural audits of the office infrastructures wherever required. We conduct Food/Water testing once in 6 months, also conducted medical check up of cafeteria, kitchen and counter staffs once in a year. Branch visits are done to make sure that office is being maintained properly.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Hazardous areas like electrical panels, pumps, Fire Pumps etc are identified and signages are displayed. Access is provided to authorize people only at critical areas like server room, electrical rooms etc. Safety PPE kits are encouraged to electrical staffs during the maintenance or operation work. Fire Exit Signages are displayed at all appropriate locations. Relevant Fire Extinguishers are placed across the office and critical areas such as server room/Hub room, Electrical panels, cafeteria kitchen etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The organization emphasizes on the importance of maintaining a safe and healthy workplace for all employees, workers and third-party stakeholders who work on its premises. We provide a very conducive and healthy work atmosphere by providing temperature control offices, prepacked purified drinking water, hygienic work area and washrooms. We have annual maintenance contract for all critical and noncritical equipment’s wherein regular planned maintenance activities are conducted for enhancement of life and to avoid any breakdowns/hazards of the assets. Fire Alarm Systems, Fire Fighting System, Fire Extinguishers & CCTV monitoring in the office. Wherever possible we provide sick bay/medical rooms in our premises. Structural audits are conducted on the requirement basis. Branch visits are done to make sure that office is being maintained properly. We conduct food testing frequently. Emergency contact list has been shared with security desk. Fire Drills Access Control System Fire Detection System & Fire Fighting System. CCTV Monitoring
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple3ExplanatoryText: Contract employees are registered in ESIC. Additionally, some contract staffs are also covered under Mediclaim insurance. We also take a CGL global insurance policy to cover any 3rd party claims arising due to injuries during work in our offices. First Aid box facility is available across all offices. We have sick bay, wheel chairs, stretcher and basic medical supplies for emergencies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The Company believes in strong stakeholder relationships, it maintains a strategic stakeholder engagement process where it identifies key stakeholders through a vibrant mechanism. As part of the identification process, the following factors are considered: impact, influence, necessity, interest, legitimacy, and diversity
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: The Company’s stakeholder engagement strategy seeks feedback on a regular basis, which is then integrated into the organization’s medium- and long-term strategy and planning exercises.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: Based on stakeholder consultation, the Company has mapped its target beneficiary groups for its CSR initiatives. These include the rural and less privileged people who cannot afford dialysis at hospitals. With a strong belief that the Company exists not only for doing good business, but equally for the betterment of society, the Company has implemented its CSR policy/ charter to focus on Health and Sanitation
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: Project Dialysis – The Company’s flagship CSR initiative, funded and installed dialysis machines at dialysis centers located in various remote areas of the country where there were no or limited dialysis infrastructure offering free/affordable dialysis access.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: Frequent and As and when required
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: To acquire new customers and service the existing ones
To keep employees abreast of key developments happening in the company and also addressing their grievances
To update suppliers with the latest information
To inform on how the company is currently doing and what it plans to do in near future
Networking so as to be abreast of new opportunities in sector and drive change
Discussions with regard to various regulations, amendments, inspections, approvals and assessments
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The Company makes efforts to ensure that employees and other stakeholders are always treated with humanity, dignity and respect. Thomas Cook (India) Limited has a global presence and it is the philosophy of the Company that the organisation gets stronger through the diversity of the employees. The internal codes cover the guidelines on human rights and forbid discrimination or harassment based on an individuals race, colour, religion, gender, age, national origin etc. It is applicable all across the Group Companies. Employees and stakeholders have been provided many avenues to speak up fearlessly and to report any violations of the Code, or to share their concerns confidentially through various modes as per the Code of conduct.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: We have a grievance management policy along with an escalation matrix in place to handle such issues. Also, there is a Whistle Blower Policy in place for all employees to raise concerns about any irregular or unacceptable practice and/or the occurrence of misconduct.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: As there were no Human Rights issues in FY 25, no business processes were modified/introduced due to this
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: Given the nature of TCIL's business, waste management practices primarily involve segregating office waste and providing it to vendors for subsequent processing. Both liquid and solid waste from all TCIL premises across different locations are managed in accordance with the guidelines and regulations set by the local authorities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The grievances of the community could be sent in writing to any of the Branch locations of the Company and addressed to the manager of the Branch. Grievances could also be sent in writing to: sharedept@thomascook.in. The relevant HR/ Admin team will handle the grievance redressal process in the manner prescribed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: A customer complaint mechanism has been established to provide a platform for customers to voice their concerns. Customers can reach out through various channels such as calls, websites, online portals, ORMs, and mail to service. quality@thomascook.in / customercare@sotc.in. These emails are then forwarded to the relevant department for resolution. The TCIL team contacts the customer to gather further details and investigate the reported issue. Adequate procedures are in place to escalate complaints when necessary and conduct further investigations. The aim is to resolve all complaints within 30 days, and communication regarding the resolution is sent to the customer.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarkForConsumerComplaints: Details attached in the Complaint Tracker
NA. For details, please refer the complaint data shared.
NA. For details, please refer the complaint data shared.
NA. For details, please refer the complaint data shared.
NA. For details, please refer the complaint data shared.
NA. For details, please refer the complaint data shared.
NA. For details, please refer the complaint data shared.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: As far as our understanding, no incidents are reported till date by any customer on this
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: All information regarding business of the Company can be accessed through the Company’s website www.thomascook.in and in its periodic disclosures such as the stock exchange intimations and in the integrated annual report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: The Company educates and makes its customers aware about safety related information from time to time.
